title: The Coven Divided
intro: The Circle quarrels openly now. Two camps have formed at the hearth, and both look to you to name which Runehold will be: a coven of careful memory, or a coven that dares the Flame.

advisors.text: Tell them we are keepers of memory first. Caution has kept us alive this long.
Tell them we are children of the Flame. A coven that fears its own god deserves no apprentices.

win.text: You name Runehold a house of remembrance. The careful are heartened; the bold go quiet, and a little cold.
win.saga: With the Circle split between caution and daring, you named Runehold a house of memory — the careful were heartened, the bold went cold.

choices.label: Declare for the Flame and daring

win.text: You name Runehold a house of the Flame. The devout blaze up; the cautious bite their tongues and watch.
win.saga: With the Circle split, you named Runehold a house of the Flame — the devout blazed up, the cautious bit their tongues and watched.

choices.label: Refuse to choose — hold the Circle together

win.text: You speak for an hour and somehow both camps leave believing they won. It will not hold forever. It holds tonight.
win.saga: With the Circle split between memory and Flame, you refused to choose and held both camps together — for tonight, at least.

lose.text: Your careful words satisfy no one. Both camps decide you are weak, and say so.
lose.saga: You tried to hold the divided Circle together without choosing, and satisfied no one — both camps judged you weak, and said so.
